category_sources: Official README describes three small code generators for Xcode-related Objective-C workflows.
source_facts.description says it provides tools to help work with XCode.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is objc-codegenutils; README title is codegenutils.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents objc-assetgen, objc-colordump, objc-identifierconstants, usage, and common command-line options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/puls/objc-codegenutils; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README ties the tools to Xcode asset catalogs, color palettes, storyboards, and generated Objective-C code.
source_facts.executables list objc-assetgen, objc-colordump, and objc-identifierconstants.
